title: Grow Bags for Vegetables, 5 Pack 3 Gallon Non-Woven Fabric Tomato Grow Bags Pots with Handles for Vegetables, Potatos, Tomatoes, Strawberry, Flowers and Fruits, Black
features: Promote Root Formation: Our grow bags for vegetables are made of high quality nonwoven fabric prevents roots from circling and enhance root structure to promote healthy root development
Ventilated and Drainage: Tomato grow bags have excellent drainage eliminating problems with over watering, soil will be moist but not too wet
Grow Healthily: The grow bag provided a suitable temperature and humidity for plant growing, suitable for planting potatoes, tomatoes, garlic, onions, beans, fruits, flowers and so on
Portable Handles: The vegetable grow bags with thickened nylon handles, sturdy and robust, comfortable touch, convenient for moving the plant around the garden, deck, patio, balcony or porch

Reusable and Foldable: potato grow bags is washable when it gets dirty and also reusable. It can be folded up and kept in a dry, cool place until the next season; Size: 3 Gallon (12 L) - 25.5cm (D) x 24.5cm (H)
description: Product Description Mactoou 5-pack 3 gallon plant grow bags for vegetables for those with limited garden space, or to bring the garden closer to you. Grow bags are made of non-woven fabric material, anti-corrosion, moisture-proof, ventilated, prevents roots from circling and enhance root structure to promote healthy root development, leanding higer yields, better than plastic pot. Compare with traditional plant pots, our tomato grow bag have the following advantage: Ventilated, improve root struture Excellent drainage Portable handles Washable and reusable Foldable Sturdy and robust Size: 25.5cm (D) x 24.5cm (H) Capacity: 12L Material: Non-Woven Fabric Package contain: 5x 3 Gallon Grow Bags Great for small gardens, patios, balconies, decks. Create a quick and easy garden for vegetables and annuals, you could or plant tomatoes, potatoes, carrot, garlic, onions, vegetables, flower, fruit. Easy to Transfer With sturdy handles for easier, more secure lifting and moving. Robust & Reusable With reinforced seams, makes our grow bag more sturdy, which is robust and reusable for long time use.
